subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of God, the Master of Destiny, speaketh forth from His Most Great Horizon in this Palace which hath been raised up for the Days of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان الله مالک القدر ینطق فی منظره الاکبر فی هذا القصر الذی بنی لایام الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels
